description: Build pages and manage products, orders, and content on the WebCake/StoreCake storefront builder.
name: io.github.vuluu2k/webcake-storefront-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Storefront JWT Bearer token (the builder's `jwt` cookie / store_jwt).
environmentVariables.name: WEBCAKE_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Session id sent as the x-session-id header (the builder's `wsid` cookie).
environmentVariables.name: WEBCAKE_SESSION_ID

environmentVariables.description: Named environment preset that fills the API + app base URLs (default prod).
environmentVariables.name: WEBCAKE_ENV

environmentVariables.description: Optional Pexels API key for the search_images tool.
environmentVariables.name: PEXELS_API_KEY

title: WebCake Storefront
